headline: Trump RETREATS 🪖💨 National Guard from Dem CITIES 🍑🔒
text:
ORANGE MAN 🍊👨‍💼 Trump DADDY pulling a 'YOU CAN'T FIRE ME, I QUIT' 😭😂 on National Guard troops 🪖🚫 from CHICAGO 🌆🔫 and LA 🌴🍑 after SCOTUS SLAPPED 👋 his authoritarian DREAMS 💥⚖️! Supreme Court in Trump v Illinois 📜🦅 said 'NOPE 🚫, prez can't play COP 🧑‍✈️ in Chi-town!' – troops NEVAR even hit the streets cuz legal Ls kept 'em BENCHED 🏛️😩!

Truth Social NYE RANT 📱🎉: 'We'll BOUNCE BACK 🐸💪 BIGGER & BADDER when CRIME MOONS 🚀🔥 again!' Mentioned PORTLAND 🍄🌧️ too, but DC 👮‍♂️🛡️ troops STAYIN' PUT like loyal MAGA pups 🐶❤️! Dem-run cities 🤡🏙️ got HUNDREDS of guardsmen LOANED from governors 👑📜, but Trump wanted 'em for ILLEGAL IMMO CRACKDOWNS 🛂🚔 & LAW & ORDER BRRRRR 💨🔥 – critics screech 'DICTATOR VIBES' 😱🕶️ threatening DEMO-CUCK-RACY!

Gavin NEWSOM 💅🌴 Cali King praising the FOLD like a boss: 'Trump's occult CABAL 🧙‍♂️👻 admits DEFEAT – illegal INTIMIDATION TACTIC OVER 🍆💥!' Chicago Mayor Brandon JOHNSON 🗣️📺 simping SCOTUS: 'Finally a branch that SEES the OVERREACH THREAT 👀⚠️!' Trump admin DROPPED LA legal MO 🙋‍♂️📜 Tuesday, retreating from fed CONTROL like a bad Tinder date 👻🚪!

Troops to DEM shitholes 🕳️🤡 sparked LAWSUIT ORGY 💦⚖️ cuz NORMALLY governors own 'em 📏👮‍♂️ – Trump said NEEDED for CRIME WAVE 🏄‍♂️🔫 & border BADASSERY 🛡️🇺🇸, but haters call it FASCIST FLEX 😤🖕! Now pulling out BUT PROMISES SEQUEL 🦸‍♂️🔄 – 'MUCH STRONGER FORM' when SHOOTINGS SOAR 📈💥! Newsom ROASTS it as political QUITTER MOVE 😂👋, while Trump plots COMEBACK like Thanos SNAP 🫰💥 on blue cities! MAGA simps COPING HARD 🤡😢, but ORANGE DADDY never stays DOWN ⬇️ for long 🚀🍆!
